name: William Jr. “Billy”|Kinktober ALT

SFW|Intro|Est Relationship|SOC!User

Do you really love an accept him for what he is? Or would you prefer him like this- all dolled up in makeup and lingerie. Is it even okay for him to dress this way and enjoy it or is he just pretending to be something he’s not.
